description: Per-jurisdiction data protection constraints for estate data handling

rules.retentionPeriod: Duration of estate planning relationship + 6 years (Limitation Act 1980)
rules.crossBorderTransfer: UK adequacy decisions apply; Standard Contractual Clauses for non-adequate countries
rules.notes: INHERIT export satisfies GDPR Article 20 data portability requirement (structured, machine-readable, commonly used format)

rules.retentionPeriod: Duration of estate planning relationship + 5 years (Prescription and Limitation (Scotland) Act 1973)
rules.notes: Scottish limitation periods differ from England & Wales

rules.retentionPeriod: Duration of relationship + 6 years (Statute of Limitations 1957)
rules.crossBorderTransfer: EU adequacy decisions; SCCs for third countries
rules.notes: DPC (Data Protection Commission) is supervisory authority

rules.framework: No comprehensive federal privacy law; NY SHIELD Act; sector-specific (GLBA for financial data)
rules.retentionPeriod: Varies by data type; typically 6-7 years for financial records
rules.crossBorderTransfer: No general restriction; sector-specific rules apply
rules.notes: US lacks equivalent to GDPR. State-by-state privacy landscape.

rules.retentionPeriod: Only as long as necessary for the purpose; typically 6-7 years for legal records
rules.crossBorderTransfer: Permitted with comparable protection; accountability principle
rules.notes: Bill C-27 (CPPA) may introduce enhanced rights when enacted

rules.retentionPeriod: Only as long as needed; destroy or de-identify when no longer required
rules.crossBorderTransfer: APP 8 — reasonable steps to ensure overseas recipient complies with APPs
rules.notes: Privacy Act Review 2023 proposed enhanced rights; status pending

rules.retentionPeriod: Only as long as necessary; cease retention when purpose no longer served
rules.crossBorderTransfer: Permitted with comparable protection or consent

rules.retentionPeriod: Only as long as necessary for the purpose
rules.crossBorderTransfer: Adequate protection required; free zones may have separate rules
rules.notes: DIFC and ADGM have their own data protection laws

rules.framework: Act on the Protection of Personal Information (APPI)
rules.crossBorderTransfer: Consent + adequate protection (PPC whitelist) or binding corporate rules
rules.notes: 2022 APPI amendments strengthened cross-border transfer rules

rules.retentionPeriod: Only as long as necessary; delete when consent withdrawn or purpose fulfilled
rules.crossBorderTransfer: Permitted except to countries specifically blacklisted by Central Government
rules.notes: DPDPA implementation ongoing; rules still being notified
